testcase.name: Search for a term
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Google search page........................................passed When I search for "GitHub"..................................................passed Then I should see "GitHub" in the results...................................passed

testcase.name: Press the ENTER key
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Key Presses page...................................passed When the user presses the "ENTER" key.......................................passed Then the result should show "You entered: ENTER"............................passed

testcase.name: Press the TAB key
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Key Presses page...................................passed When the user presses the "TAB" key.........................................passed Then the result should show "You entered: TAB"..............................passed

testcase.name: Press the ESCAPE key
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Key Presses page...................................passed When the user presses the "ESCAPE" key......................................passed Then the result should show "You entered: ESCAPE"...........................passed

testcase.name: Press the letter A
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Key Presses page...................................passed When the user presses the "A" key...........................................passed Then the result should show "You entered: A"................................passed

testcase.name: Press the SPACE key
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Key Presses page...................................passed When the user presses the "SPACE" key.......................................passed Then the result should show "You entered: SPACE"............................passed

testcase.name: Press multiple keys and verify result - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Key Presses page...................................passed When the user presses the "UP" key..........................................passed Then the result should show "You entered: UP"...............................passed

testcase.name: Press multiple keys and verify result - #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Key Presses page...................................passed When the user presses the "DOWN" key........................................passed Then the result should show "You entered: DOWN".............................passed

testcase.name: Press multiple keys and verify result - #1.3
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Key Presses page...................................passed When the user presses the "LEFT" key........................................passed Then the result should show "You entered: LEFT".............................passed

testcase.name: Press multiple keys and verify result - #1.4
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Key Presses page...................................passed When the user presses the "RIGHT" key.......................................passed Then the result should show "You entered: RIGHT"............................passed
